'''βàöh-s-ng-ng''' ('''kahasngengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jew|jew]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-s-ng-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jew|jew]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöh-s-ng-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kahasngengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihasngengoko|thihasngengoko]] || [[word:jihasngengoko|jihasngengoko]] || [[word:shihasngengoko|shihasngengoko]] || [[word:kihasngengoko|kihasngengoko]]
|-

|-
